notes:
What's new in 1.3.3:
- Adds large-file preview mode for very large logs, loading navigable line chunks so the app stays responsive when switching into multi-million-line files.
- Keeps pop-out, in-viewer find, go-to-line, previous/next line navigation, font sizing, and wrap controls working with large-file chunks.
- Moves the shared download folder into Tools > Settings, defaults it to %USERPROFILE%\Downloads, and adds Open Download Folder access from both Log Files and Search.
- Updates Log Files downloads so single-file downloads save directly and open immediately, multi-select becomes Download Selected, and Download All creates a timestamped zip for the visible file set without a Save As prompt.

Also new in 1.3.2 (if upgrading from 1.3.1 or earlier):
- Adds elapsed request timing to detailed diagnostics logs and always-on app logs so hosted-instance slowdowns are easier to triage.
- Changes connection logging into a numbered five-step workflow from Connection started through Connection ready.
